features: Provides up to 48 hours of antiperspirant protection
0% Alcohol that helps underarm skin to recover from the irritation caused by hair removal
Refreshing essence of cucumber and green tea
description: Product Description Dove Go fresh cucumber and green tea deodorant stick 40ml this antiperspirant deodorant gives you 48 hours of protection, care of the armpits and a refreshing aroma of cucumber and green tea. There's nothing like that newly showered sensation. That fresh and clean feeling is the best way to start the day, so wouldn't it be great if you could get it with an antiperspirant deodorant? Well, luckily for you, that's exactly what we've done with the Dove GO fresh cucumber and green tea deodorant in barra. Its invigorating aroma of cucumber and green tea will give you a touch of extra energy, and with 48 hours of antiperspirant protection, you can keep that fresh and cold feeling with you all day thanks to one of our best antiperspirant deodorant products. This Dove antiperspirant deodorant incorporates a powerful antiperspirant technology, but remains gentle on your delicate skin. Our 0% alcohol formula - containing Dove NutriumMoisture and our exclusive 1/4 of moisturisers - can help your armpit skin recover from the irritation that regular hair removal can cause. Since it's part of the Dove GO fresh line, you know it will have a refreshing scent that balances the protection of antiperspirant deodorants with skin care. Ingredients INGREDIENTS Aluminum Zirconium Tetrachlorohydrex GLY, Stearyl Alcohol, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cyclopentasiloxane, Isopropyl Palmitate, PPG-14 Butyl Ether, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, PEG-8, Dimethicone, Parfum, Silica, Polyethylene, Helianthus Annuus Seed Öl, Steareth. H-100, BHT, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool Directions Clean and dry the armpits before use. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the armpits. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Repeat if necessary during the day or after physical activity for continuous protection. See more
